instruction: Help me enter the order information into the tracker

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

printf 'Sales Order
Order No: SO-20250315-0088
Client: Shanghai Minghua Trading Co.
Order Date: 2025-03-15
Product: Industrial Sensor X-200
Quantity: 500 pcs
Unit Price: 380 CNY
Total Amount: 190000 CNY
Delivery Date: 2025-04-15
Sales Rep: Zhou Peng' > /home/user/Desktop/order_detail.txt

python3 -c "import openpyxl; wb = openpyxl.Workbook(); ws = wb.active; ws['A1'] = 'Order No'; ws['B1'] = 'Client'; ws['C1'] = 'Product'; ws['D1'] = 'Quantity'; ws['E1'] = 'Total Amount(CNY)'; ws['F1'] = 'Delivery Date'; ws['G1'] = 'Sales Rep'; wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/order_tracker.xlsx')"

phases.instruction: Help me enter the order information into the tracker

Fill the order information from /home/user/Desktop/order_detail.txt into /home/user/Desktop/order_tracker.xlsx row 2: A2='SO-20250315-0088', B2='Shanghai Minghua Trading Co.', C2='Industrial Sensor X-200', D2=500, E2=190000, F2='2025-04-15', G2='Zhou Peng', save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/order_tracker.xlsx'); s = df.to_string(); print('PASSED' if 'SO-20250315-0088' in s else 'FAILED')"
